_description: Registry of prose gates: declarative source of truth binding prose intent in skill state files to a programmatic enforcement mechanism. Consumed by validators, hooks, and lint rules. See .claude/patterns/prose-gates-schema.json for shape validation. Closes #1434/#1431/#1393/#1433 defect class.

_schema_version_notes.1: Initial — 6 gates covering the #1434 symptom table. All entries start fail_mode=warn for Phase A soak (Phase B). Phase C flips 4 of 6 to deny.
_schema_version_notes.2: fail_mode field is now load-bearing for callers that opt in via prose_gate_mode.resolve(). Helper enforces snapshot version-check before consulting registry value, preserving in-flight run safety. Phase C-fast: gates 1, 2, 4, 6 flipped warn→deny; gate 5 (retro-suppressions-confirmation) registry corrected from warn to deny matching #1393 phase-2 runtime default. Gate 3 (verify-state-2-phase1-spawn-no-background) is binary skill-yaml-mode and now omits fail_mode entirely (no warn↔deny concept). Closes #1449/#1431/#1433.
_schema_version_notes.2.1: PR 2 adds gate #7 agent-trace-schema-completeness (warn mode, validator-extension) enforcing AOC v1.3 workarounds[] and template_gap_observed[] keys present on every trace-writing agent. PR 3 will flip warn→deny after 1-2 weeks observation. No other registry changes.

gates.intent: Numerical claims in lead-synthesized aggregates must be bounded by the coverage_provider artifact. Defense-in-depth fallback: where no per-agent bound is registered, all numerical fields MUST be zero AND no_fixes_claimed:true.

bounded_fields.min_score: >=10 only when coverage_provider proves all-pages-fast-path; else <= max(per_page_traces.score)

waivers.rationale: #1256 — verify/state-3a-design-agents.md:134-147 Stage 0 fast-path; lead synthesizes both aggregates when PR_RELEVANT=0

gates.intent: User must explicitly approve the plan before advancing to STATE 7. advance-state.sh bootstrap 6 is denied unless .runs/user-approval-evidence.json exists with approval_source, quoted_user_reply (min_length:8), and timestamp within 60s of now.
verify Phase 1 spawn agents must run in foreground. Enforced by skill-agent-gate.sh reading mode:foreground from verify/skill.yaml.
gates._no_fail_mode_reason: Binary enforcement via skill-yaml-mode: agent either runs in foreground (passes) or in background (denied). No warn↔deny gradient applies. fail_mode field omitted by schema v2 condition (required only when enforcement_kind != 'skill-yaml-mode'). Helper prose_gate_mode.resolve() raises ProseGateError if invoked for this gate; the enforcer (skill-agent-gate.sh) does not call the helper.

gates.intent: observation-phase.md Step 5c must invoke audit-sample.py unconditionally; .runs/audit-sample-result.json must exist with {triggered, audit_outcome, anomaly_count_observed}; when triggered==true, audit_outcome must be non-empty.
Each suppression in retrospective-result.json must carry confirmation_evidence (min_length:40); each findings_filed[] entry must carry confirmation_evidence (min_length:40).

Stage 0 lead-synthesized design-critic aggregate permitted only when ALL_PAGES_FAST_PATH=true auto-detection fired. Manual bypass must carry auto_trigger_evidence (sha:<40 hex> OR marker:legitimate-bypass:<>=40 chars>).

Every trace-writing agent (28 classes, AOC v1.3) MUST emit `workarounds[]` and `template_gap_observed[]` keys with empty-array defaults. Eliminates per-class schema carveouts that broke observer ingestion uniformity (#1252 mistake). Phase C-fast PR 2 lands warn; PR 3 flips to deny after observation.
